cards.afterText: If you won the combat, deal 1 damage to each fighter adjacent to the Hollow Oak.
cards.title: Breaking Boughs

cards.basicText: Move the Hollow Oak up to 5 spaces. It may move through spaces containing opposing fighters.
cards.title: The Forest Walks

cards.basicText: Move the Ember Fox up to 5 spaces; it may move through spaces containing opposing fighters. Then draw 1 card.
cards.title: Foxfire

cards.afterText: Move this fighter up to 3 spaces away from every opposing fighter.
cards.title: Rooted Elsewhere

cards.afterText: Move this fighter up to 5 spaces. It may move through spaces containing opposing fighters.
cards.title: Only the Wind in the Leaves

cards.afterText: Move the opposing fighter up to 3 spaces. It may move through spaces containing fighters.
cards.title: A Trick of the Light

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, choose one of the fighters in the combat and move them up to 2 spaces.
cards.title: Skirmish

cards.duringText: If your fighter started this turn in a different space, this card's value is 5 instead.
cards.title: Momentous Shift

cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Feint

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If you won the combat, draw 2 cards instead.
cards.title: Regroup

hero.name: The Hollow Oak
hero.specialAbility:
JUST ANOTHER TREE
At the end of your turn, if there are no opposing fighters in the Hollow Oak's zone, you may draw 1 card.
hero.quote: A colossal walking oak that is happiest in an empty grove — a lone bruiser who crashes through the treeline with enormous swings, then stands still until it is just another tree.

sidekick.name: The Ember Fox
sidekick.quote: A quick fox with fur that smolders at the tips, trailing sparks through the undergrowth.

name: The Hollow Oak
note: Unbrewed spice remix of the evergreen Hollow Oak deck: same hero, statline, and JUST ANOTHER TREE fight-alone engine, with 4 reworked cards (Foxfire, Rooted Elsewhere, Only the Wind in the Leaves, A Trick of the Light) that manufacture the solitude the hero rewards. Art reuses Hollow Oak's until dedicated spice art lands.
